intent: Create a technical report for a water treatment system with component assumptions, risks and validation gates.
acceptance_criteria: Compiler routes report request toward technical documentation or flags missing registry coverage.
Generated plan includes assumptions, risks and validation evidence.
Review report identifies missing evidence or unresolved blockers.
nexus_integration_notes: Nexus can dispatch this to a research/review pipeline before document generation.
Runtime should return report artifact refs and evidence notes.
